questions.question: Paul says a person will reap what they do what?
What does Paul boast about at the end of this letter?
options: The cross of our Lord Jesus Christ
questions.answer: The cross of our Lord Jesus Christ

questions.question: Paul says believers should carry each other's burdens.
Do not be deceived. God is not mocked. For whatever a man sows, that he will also _____.
Neither circumcision nor uncircumcision means anything; what counts is a new _____.
